positive: A stylized geometric representation of a majestic forest spirit owl, perched on a minimalist branch, viewed against a deep indigo watercolor wash background. The owl should feature clean, symmetrical feather patterns rendered in metallic gold line art and complementary sapphire blue fills. Incorporate celestial elements like crescent moons and stylized stars forming a circular, repeating mandala pattern behind the owl. The overall style must be modern neo-tribal, highly symmetrical, and designed for seamless repeatability. Emphasis on strong silhouettes, high contrast, and clean vector aesthetics, perfect for apparel printing. Lighting should be dramatic and atmospheric, making the gold elements appear luminous.
negative: blur, artifacts, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, deformed, bad anatomy, asymmetrical, busy, cluttered
